title: FAMILY SUPPORT - 211info
text: ELYSIUM SANCTUARY FAMILY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, shoes, school supplies, and birthday party supplies for foster families, and shares information about community events and activities through published or online calendars Confidential Address Eligibility: Resource (Foster) families Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to fill out request form; use Family Supports button (clothing, school supplies) or Birthday Parties button. Call or email for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Birthday Programs * Foster Families Children's Clothing * Foster Children Community Calendars * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Home Delivered Meals * Foster Families School Supplies * Foster Families Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - GUARDIAN CIRCLE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ELYSIUM SANCTUARY
